title: Metabolomics Profile in ABAT Deficiency Pre- and Post-treatment.
author: Koenig MK Bonnen PE
content: S-EPMC6323032 PMC6323032 Metabolomics Profile in ABAT Deficiency Pre- and Post-treatment. Metabolomic profiling is an emerging technology in the clinical setting with immediate diagnostic potential for the population of patients with Inborn Errors of Metabolism. We present the metabolomics profile
